description: Secure the WordPress installation by addressing critical vulnerabilities and configuring automated backups. Create a new administrator account with the username 'sec_admin', email 'security@example.com', and password 'SecurePass2026!'. Delete the original 'admin' user and reassign all of their existing content to 'sec_admin'. Disable the built-in theme and plugin file editor by adding the 'DISALLOW_FILE_EDIT' definition set to true in '/var/www/html/wordpress/wp-config.php'. Install the 'UpdraftPlus WordPress Backup Plugin' and configure both the files and database backup schedules to 'Weekly' with a retention limit of '4' backups.
